description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and try-import branches and on pull requests. The workflow has multiple jobs: check-commit and check-format run on ubuntu-latest to lint commits and code format; cpu-test and gpu-test run on self-hosted environments with specific container images to build and test MegEngine; auto-merge merges try-import into master if successful; and send-dingding sends a DingTalk notification if cpu-test or gpu-test fails.
